sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Hash Production & Fleet Architecture
required_elements: Hashrate inventory and global network ranking
ASIC fleet composition and generational mix
Power consumption efficiency (J/TH) benchmarking
Hosting vs. self-mining split and margin profile

sections.title: Energy Economics & Power Purchase Agreements
required_elements: Power cost documentation and PPA contract terms
Curtailment revenue opportunities and grid demand response exposure
Renewable energy sourcing and ESG/carbon credit monetization
Operating margin sensitivity to power cost changes

sections.title: Bitcoin Production & Halving Cycle Economics
required_elements: BTC production yield and cost per coin calculation
Halving cycle positioning and production outlook through 2028
Network difficulty trending and competitive margin pressure
BTC treasury holdings and hodl vs. monetization strategy

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/Hashrate multiple benchmarking vs. peers
Operating margin and FCF margin modeling
DCF valuation across multiple halving cycles and BTC price scenarios
Leverage analysis and covenant stress testing

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: ASIC fleet vintage and stranded asset risk monitoring
Power cost inflation and PPA expiry refinancing risk
Regulatory and ESG headwinds affecting operational licenses
BTC price breakeven and covenant stress at lower price points

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Operating margin sensitivity across BTC price and power cost scenarios
Halving cycle production economics and treasury strategy impact
Power contract maturity schedule and energy cost exposure modeling
